title: Mugland Knows the Truth
hook: Charles suspects Ambrost Mugland knows what happened to the missing children and is hiding the answers.
playerSummary: Direct pressure on Mugland may reveal witnesses, records, or denials tied to the children who vanished.
gmTruth: Use this thread for suppressed records, hidden witnesses, carefully curated denials, and the possibility that Mugland knows far more than anyone has been allowed to prove.
